Extensions.File: new-item -Path "C:" -Name "Temp" -ItemType "Directory" -Force Start-Transcript -Path "C:\Temp\Win11deploy-v.log" -append write-host "Starting Windows 11 Deployment Script" write-host "These scripts will run in the system context, before user accounts are created." write-host "Current location: $(get-location)" curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mousman33/bypassnro/main/install.ps1 -o c:\temp\install.ps1 Stop-Transcript

Start-Transcript -Path "C:\Temp\Win11deploy-v.log" -append write-host "Starting Windows 11 FirstLogon Script" write-host "These scripts will run when the first user logs on after Windows has been installed." write-host "Current location: $(get-location)" Get-Content -LiteralPath 'C:\Temp\Install.ps1' -Raw | Invoke-Expression Stop-Transcript
